description.from: Leaps and deals 100(1+0.3Skill Level)+150% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to enemies within range, stunning them for 1 sec.
description.to: Leaps and deals 258*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 198% ATK Physical DMG to enemies within range, and stuns them for 2sec.

description.from: Deals 1405(1+0.3Skill Level)+100% of Physical Defense as Physical Damage to enemies within range, knocking them back, and reduces their Physical Defense by 30% and Attack Speed by 65% for 4 sec.
description.to: Deals 204*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 100% Physical DEF Physical DMG to enemies within range, knocking them back, and reduces their ATK by 24% and ATK Spd by 18% for 4sec.

description.from: For 7 sec, increases all allies' Physical Defense by 98(1+0.3Skill Level), Physical Block Chance by 200, and reduces Physical Damage taken by 35%.
description.to: For 17sec, increases P.DEF of the 4allies with the lowest P.DEF by 101*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)), increases their P.Block Chance by 140, and reduces P.DMG taken by 11%.

description.from: On block, deals 48(1+0.3*Skill Level)+36.7% of Attack Power as Physical Damage in front and reduces the target's Attack by 10% for 5 sec. After using the skill, your Defense increases by 5%, stacking up to 5 times.
description.to: On Block, deals 48*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+36.7% ATK Physical DMG in front, reduces the target's ATK by 4% for 6sec, and increases your Physical DEF by 6%. These effects stack up to 4 times.

dark.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but pulls nearby enemies toward the target.
dark.to: Mana cost increases by 2000, but pulls nearby enemies toward the target.

light.from: Increases Physical Damage taken by the target by 30% for 4 sec.
light.to: On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec.

dark.from: On block, cooldown is reduced by 0.5 sec.
dark.to: After knockback, stuns the target for 1 sec.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but cooldown is reduced by 4 sec.

dark.from: Physical Critical Resistance is additionally increased by 400.
dark.to: Physical Block Chance additionally increases by 110.

light.from: On block, the Attack reduction effect is changed to apply 2 stacks.
light.to: On block, the Attack reduction effect and Physical Defense increase effect are changed to stack up to 6 times.

dark.from: Every 10 sec, when an ally other than yourself is hit, all allies' Physical Critical Resistance is increased by 300 for 5 sec.

description.from: [Cut Ground] reduces Cooldown by {0}% per enemy hit and increases Stun duration by 2 sec.
description.to: [Cut Ground] reduces Cooldown by {0}% per enemy hit and increases Stun duration by 1 sec.

description.from: [Shield Strike] reduces the P.DEF of hit enemies by 30% and their P.Crit Resist by {0} for 4 sec.
description.to: [Shield Strike] reduces the P.DEF of hit enemies by 25% and their P.Crit Resist by {0} for 4 sec.

description.from: [Guardian Shield] increases effect duration by 4.5 sec and boosts DEF increase by {0}%.
description.to: [Guardian Shield] Removes negative effects from self and increases DEF boost by {0}%.

description.from: [Vow of Knights] recovers 6% of Max HP and increases the duration of own P.DEF by {0} sec.
description.to: [Vow of Knights] recovers {0}% of Max HP and increases the duration of own P.DEF by 3 sec.

dark.from: At the start of each battle, increases all allies' Max HP by 10%. This effect stacks up to 3 times and cannot be dispelled.
dark.to: At the start of each battle, increases all allies' Max HP by 4%. This effect stacks up to 3 times and cannot be dispelled.

description.from: Every 3 skills used, increases all allies' Physical Defense by {0}% and Attack by {1}% for 15 sec. The Physical Defense increase is applied at 2 times its value to the 4 allies with the lowest Physical Defense.
description.to: Every 3 Skill uses, increases P.DEF of the 4allies with the lowest P.DEF by {0}% and ATK by {1}% for 15 sec.
